reviews.review_description: This map is NOT original and a lot of remakes use it. It has no elevator, so new players cannot jump to next floors easily. This is genuinely a cheap and not well thought game. Same map that a lot of people use, no uniqueness like the last game.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback! But just to let you know this is OG Lethal Ape Redux, which means it's an archive of the old version of the game. 

It's meant to preserve the classic experience exactly as it was back then.

If you're looking for updated features, new content, and improvements like elevators, you should check out my main game Lethal Ape, that's where all the new updates and features are! This OG version exists purely for nostalgia and archival purposes.

reviews.review_description: Best game im first to review its valkyrie btw
My game is bugged I can’t join a server still a 5 star tho
I actually love this game and its sooo FUUUN
Apart from the original this game has a cool new map monsters and cosmetics overall pretty fun
Please bring the old one back!!!

developer_response.body: This is not a update, you are playing a seperate game. If you want the other version play "Lethal Ape" NOT "Lethal Ape R"
